name: elevenlabs_voice_changer
description: Re-voice an existing recording into any ElevenLabs voice (speech-to-speech), preserving the original delivery/emotion.

audio_path.description: Local path to the source recording to re-voice (e.g. a session upload file).

target_voice.description: The ElevenLabs voice to convert into. Accepts an 'elevenlabs:<id>' or a raw voice id.
